sources.title: How After Hours AI Coverage Turns Missed Calls into Dealership Revenue | Mia
sources.excerpt: One report from [CallSource](https://www.callsource.com/blog/13-notable-inbound-phone-call-automotive-stats-for-dealers/) found that more than half of inbound dealership calls represent real revenue opportunities, and about 75% of those calls relate to fixed ops, such as service and parts. ‍ The challenge?
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as research-only competitor topic signal src_001 for after-hours-ai-coverage-missed-calls-into-dealership-revenue; not intended as a published outbound citation.

sources.title: Put Missed Calls on Hold and Turn Rings into Revenue | Reynolds and Reynolds
sources.excerpt: Research shows 27 to 35 percent of calls happen after hours.
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as source src_002 for after-hours-ai-coverage-missed-calls-into-dealership-revenue; 8 quote anchors were extracted for draft generation.

sources.title: How to Choose an After Hours Answering Service | Numa
sources.excerpt: No matter how many people call or how many texts Numa sends to serve them, that’s all you pay. ## Serve your customers 24/7 Every after hours call is an opportunity to earn someone’s business.
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as research-only competitor topic signal src_003 for after-hours-ai-coverage-missed-calls-into-dealership-revenue; not intended as a published outbound citation.

sources.title: How Dealerships Lose Millions of Revenue to Missed Calls & 5 Ways to Fix It | Numa
sources.excerpt: This is especially critical during [the morning rush (8-11:30 a.m.), when 50% of all appointment-related calls occur](https://www.cbtnews.com/numas-2024-insights-reveal-1-17m-in-lost-revenue-from-missed-service-calls/). **Why it works:** It guarantees 100% call capture.
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as research-only competitor topic signal src_004 for after-hours-ai-coverage-missed-calls-into-dealership-revenue; not intended as a published outbound citation.

sources.title: How Numa Handles Missed Calls at Automotive Dealerships | Numa
sources.excerpt: With 75% of voicemail callers never calling back and an average RO value of $450, the annual revenue at risk exceeds $6.5 million. **Q: How does Numa compare to other missed-call or texting tools?** A: Most point solutions address one moment in the communication loop.
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as research-only competitor topic signal src_005 for after-hours-ai-coverage-missed-calls-into-dealership-revenue; not intended as a published outbound citation.

sources.title: The Real Cost of a Missed Call at a Car Dealership (And What to Do About It) | Numa
sources.excerpt: In the peak afternoon window — roughly 2PM to 5PM — up to 75% of inbound calls are status requests.
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as research-only competitor topic signal src_006 for after-hours-ai-coverage-missed-calls-into-dealership-revenue; not intended as a published outbound citation.

sources.title: How Numa Recovers Missed Revenue for Automotive Dealerships | Numa
sources.excerpt: With 75% of callers who go to voicemail never calling back and an average repair order value of $450, this can lead to over $6.5 million in lost revenue annually.
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as research-only competitor topic signal src_007 for after-hours-ai-coverage-missed-calls-into-dealership-revenue; not intended as a published outbound citation.

sources.title: The 4 ways dealerships leak revenue every day (and why adding staff doesn't fix it) | Numa
sources.excerpt: A dealership doing 80 appointments per day loses roughly $180,000 per month from the 20% that don't show and never hear back. **Leak 3 — Departments that don't talk:** The intro appointment that sales promised but service never received.
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as research-only competitor topic signal src_008 for after-hours-ai-coverage-missed-calls-into-dealership-revenue; not intended as a published outbound citation.
